steps.title: Track Leo's desire
steps.content: Leo has begged his father for years to take him to La Reina, imagines becoming a hero if he crosses the haunted gates first, and hopes this summer will finally be the time.

steps.title: Reject unsupported purposes
steps.content: Choice A invents pride from Leo's father. Choice B contradicts the detail that Leo is almost twelve, and choice C invents a dislike of summer. Every detail instead emphasizes Leo's strong wish to visit La Reina. The answer is D.
